title: Path of Exile 2 Build File
description: JSON Schema for .build files consumed by the Path of Exile 2 in-game Build Planner. Files live in 'Documents/My Games/Path of Exile 2/BuildPlanner' and must end in '.build'. Source spec: https://www.pathofexile.com/developer/docs/game

ascendancy.description: Ascendancy class id from the Ascendancy table (e.g. 'Mercenary2', 'Witch1'). Empty/omitted means no ascendancy hint.

passives.description: Passive tree allocations. Each entry is either a string (shorthand for just the id) or a BuildPassive object.

oneOf.description: Shorthand form: a PassiveSkills table id with no level interval or additional text.

skills.description: Active skill gems. Each entry is either a string (shorthand) or a BuildSkill object with optional support gems.

oneOf.description: Shorthand form: a BaseItemTypes table id for a skill gem.

items.description: Inventory slot hints. Used to show tips on equipment slots in the character panel; does not provide actual items.

LevelInterval.description: Inclusive character-level range [min, max]. PoE2's level cap is 100. Hint is shown to the player while their level is within this range.

AdditionalText.description: Hover/tooltip text shown in-game. Supports simple markup: <bold>{text}, <italics>{text}, <underline>{text}, named colours like <red>{text} / <green>{text}, and arbitrary RGB via <rgb(r, g, b)>{text}. Tags can nest. Use \n for newlines.

weapon_set.description: Weapon-set this passive applies to. PoE2 supports two weapon sets; typical values are 1 or 2.

id.description: A BaseItemTypes table id for an active skill gem. Example: 'Metadata/Items/Gem/SkillGemShieldWall'.

support_skills.description: Recommended support gems linked to this skill. Order is informational only.

oneOf.description: Shorthand form: a BaseItemTypes table id for a support gem.

id.description: A BaseItemTypes table id for a support gem. Example: 'Metadata/Items/Gems/SupportGemBrutality'.

BuildItem.description: A hint attached to an inventory slot. Shows when the player hovers that slot in the character panel.

slot_x.description: X coordinate within the inventory slot's grid.

slot_y.description: Y coordinate within the inventory slot's grid.

unique_name.description: A UniqueName entry from the Words table, used to suggest a specific unique item.

examples.name: Tutorial Mercenary - Shield Wall
examples.description:
<bold>{First-time player build}
Mercenary class is recommended.

passives.additional_text: Allocate after transitioning to Shield Wall.

items.additional_text: Crossbow until level 22, then swap to one-hand mace + shield.
